name: Hlomla Magopeni
title: Software Developer
bio: I don't just write code. I engineer solutions that matter.
aboutBio: With over 5 years of experience in software development, I've built everything from real-time data pipelines to consumer-facing mobile apps. My journey started with a curiosity for how things work under the hood — and it hasn't stopped since. I believe great software is invisible: it just works, delights users, and solves real problems without getting in the way.
